publishedAbstract: * In the output of the command `heketi-cli server operations info`, there's a stale entry, corresponding to the deletion of a Gluster block volume: sh-4.2# heketi-cli server operations info Operation Counts: Total: 1 In-Flight: 0 New: 0 Failed: 0 Stale: 1 sh-4.2# heketi-cli server operations list Id:3fb2f475440be3e37753433f3e69a317 Type:delete-block-volume Status:stale sh-4.2# heketi-cli server operations info 3fb2f475440be3e37753433f3e69a317 Id: 3fb2f475440be3e37753433f3e69a317 Type: delete-block-volume Status: stale Changes: Delete block volume: 74fc56f92b30daa37fd1d4ce73360e6e * After running the commands `heketi-cli server operations info && sleep 30 && heketi-cli server operations list`, still the same stale entry is listed. * How to remove then this operation?
publishedTitle: Why is Heketi Failing to Delete a Gluster Block Volume in OCS 3.11?
